system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

Order summary:

- B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV — Qty 1 @ USD 8,400.00
- CAL-A2LA-1Y — Calibration Service, A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year — Qty 1 @ USD 1,450.00

All packing slips and invoices will reference your PO number.

If any of the details above need adjustment, please reply to this email and we will update the order accordingly.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.body:
Dear Aurora Automotive Electronics Procurement Team,

Thank you for your purchase order against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We are pleased to confirm that PO PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296 has been received and converted to sales order SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986.

Order summary:
- Quote: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- PO: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296
- Sales Order: SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986
- Requested Ship Date: 2026-05-26
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Order Total: USD 66,250.00

Line items:
- MSOS804A — Infiniium S-Series Oscilloscope, 8 GHz, 4 analog + 16 digital — Qty 1 @ USD 56,400.00
- B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV — Qty 1 @ USD 8,400.00
- CAL-A2LA-1Y — Calibration Service, A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year — Qty 1 @ USD 1,450.00

Bill To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Accounts Payable — Americas
ee.procurement@auroraauto.com

Ship To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Receiving Dock — Americas
Attn: Lab Operations

Regarding your additional requests: a formal Statement of Acknowledgment (SOA) with the projected ship date will follow shortly from our Order Management team, and we confirm that the CAL-A2LA-1Y calibration certificates will be A2LA / ISO 17025 traceable as quoted. All packing slips and invoices will reference your PO number.

If any of the details above need adjustment, please reply to this email and we will update the order accordingly.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
